case_title: ANTHONY BARNETT VS. LANELL J. LUCAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARNETT, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCAS, LANELL J. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, (THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR THE VALUE OF THE SUBJECT VAN, AND PLAINTIFF'S FALSE IMPRISONMENT. DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN THE REQUESTED OWNER OF THE VAN.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNETT, ANTHONY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, LANELL J. ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED JAN-01-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, LANELL J.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY BARNETT, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, LANELL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
